text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simply reading words; NLP enables machines to grasp meaning and context from text. For example, it powers online translation tools, allowing you to convert a sentence from English to Spanish in seconds. NLP also performs sentiment analysis, which determines if a piece of writing expresses positive, negative, or neutral feelings. This is useful for companies analyzing customer feedback. Additionally, chatbots use NLP to understand your questions and provide helpful answers. As this technology improves, our interactions with computers become more natural and efficient.
